UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user profile data including encrypted API key and master resume.

userId.description: The unique identifier for the user.

encryptedApiKey.description: The user's API key, encrypted by the backend.

customPrompt.description: The user's custom AI optimization prompt.

driveAccessToken.description: Google Drive access token for autoconnect.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

ResumeVersion.title: ResumeVersion
ResumeVersion.description: Stores a saved version of a resume.

userId.description: The unique identifier for the user.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the version was saved.

name.description: The name of the saved version.

data.description: The resume data for this version.

TokenUsage.title: TokenUsage
TokenUsage.description: Stores monthly token usage for a user.

/users/{userId}/resumeVersions/{versionI.description: Collection of saved resume versions for a user.

/users/{userId}/tokenUsage/{monthId}.description: Collection of monthly token usage records.
